mapper.select: SELECT id, withdraw_account_number AS withdrawAccountNumber, target_account_number AS targetAccountNumber, target_account_type AS targetAccountType, transfer_amount AS transferAmount, transfer_day AS transferDay, transfer_status AS transferStatus FROM deposit_auto_transfer_tbl WHERE transfer_day = #{today} AND transfer_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO deposit_auto_transfer_tbl (withdraw_account_number, target_account_number, target_account_type, transfer_amount, transfer_day, transfer_status, created_at) VALUES (#{withdrawAccountNumber}, #{targetAccountNumber}, #{targetAccountType}, #{transferAmount}, #{transferDay}, #{transferStatus}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT id, withdraw_account_number AS withdrawAccountNumber, target_account_number AS targetAccountNumber, target_account_type AS targetAccountType, transfer_amount AS transferAmount, transfer_day AS transferDay, transfer_status AS transferStatus, created_at AS createdAt FROM deposit_auto_transfer_tbl WHERE withdraw_account_number = #{withdrawAccountNumber} AND transfer_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE deposit_auto_transfer_tbl SET target_account_number = #{targetAccountNumber}, target_account_type = #{targetAccountType}, transfer_amount = #{transferAmount}, transfer_day = #{transferDay}, transfer_status = #{transferStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO deposit_transaction_tbl ( dat_id, transaction_type, amount, transaction_date, description, balance ) SELECT dat_id, 'DEPOSIT', #{amount}, NOW(), #{description}, balance FROM deposit_account_tbl WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber}

INSERT INTO savings_transaction_tbl ( sat_id, transaction_type, transaction_amount, transaction_date, description, balance ) SELECT sat_id, 'DEPOSIT', #{amount}, NOW(), #{description}, balance FROM savings_account_tbl WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber}

INSERT INTO transaction_tbl ( ACCOUNT_NUMBER, CUSTOMER_NAME, ACCOUNT_TYPE, TRANSACTION_TYPE, AMOUNT, CURRENCY, COMMENT, TRANSACTION_DATE ) SELECT #{accountNumber}, c.customer_name, '입출금',
CASE WHEN #{amount} < 0 THEN '출금' ELSE '입금' END , ABS(#{amount}), 'KRW', #{memo}, NOW() FROM customer_tbl c WHERE c.customer_id = ( SELECT customer_id FROM account_tbl WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber} )
